info.title: Afenda ERP Internal API
info.description: Registry-driven OpenAPI document for governed /api/internal/v1 routes.

externalDocs.description: Afenda REST API governance and contract standards.

tags.name: public
tags.description: Routes callable without an authenticated session.

tags.name: memberships
tags.description: Tenant membership resolution and post-auth entry paths.

tags.name: appearance
tags.description: Tenant branding and appearance asset management.

tags.name: inventory
tags.description: Inventory master data — products and warehouses.

servers.description: ERP internal REST surface (relative to deployment origin).

get.description: Returns service health and execution spine diagnostics for load balancers and monitoring probes. Public route; no session required.

digest.description: Error digest emitted by the client runtime.

segment.description: Application segment or route associated with the error.

ClientErrorPostRequest.description: Client-reported error payload for observability ingestion (fire-and-forget).

columns.description: Fixed column count for the dashboard grid.

items.description: Ordered widget layout items for the dashboard.

rowHeight.description: Base row height in pixels for grid row calculations.

version.description: Layout schema version for forward-compatible migrations.

h.description: Grid row span (height in grid units).

anyOf.description: Legacy widget identifiers retained for stored layout migration.

i.description: Unique widget key within the layout grid.

minH.description: Minimum row span enforced by the layout engine.

minW.description: Minimum column span enforced by the layout engine.

w.description: Grid column span (width in grid units).

x.description: Zero-based column position in the 12-column grid.

y.description: Zero-based row position in the layout grid.

DashboardWidgetLayoutItem.description: Single widget placement within the dashboard grid.

status.description: Initial lifecycle status; defaults to draft.

InventoryProductCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a product master record.

productId.description: UUID of the product to update.

InventoryProductUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a product master record.

productId.description: UUID of the product master record.

quantityDelta.description: Signed decimal quantity change as a string.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the movement.

warehouseId.description: UUID of the warehouse master record.

InventoryStockMovementCreateRequest.description: Request body for recording a stock movement.

status.description: Initial lifecycle status; defaults to draft.

InventoryWarehouseCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a warehouse master record.

warehouseId.description: UUID of the warehouse to update.

InventoryWarehouseUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a warehouse master record.

displayName.description: Display name for the invited user.

email.description: Email address where the invitation will be sent.

roleId.description: Identifier of the role to assign upon invite acceptance.

SystemAdminUserInviteRequest.description: Request body for inviting a new user into the tenant.

companyId.description: UUID of the company scope for the membership role change.

membershipId.description: UUID of the membership whose role is being updated.

roleId.description: UUID of the new role to assign to the membership.

SystemAdminMembershipRoleRequest.description: Request body for updating a membership role assignment.

mimeType.description: Content type of the file to upload.

TenantBrandLogoUploadRequest.description: Metadata for requesting a presigned upload URL for a tenant brand logo.

executionSpine.description: Diagnostics for background job and outbox execution.

service.description: Logical service identifier for this health probe.

status.description: Overall ERP health status derived from execution spine diagnostics.

HealthResponse.description: Health probe payload for load balancers and monitoring integrations.

ExecutionSpineOperationalStatus.description: Aggregate health of the execution spine (outbox, scheduler, worker alignment).

TriggerProviderState.description: Operational state of the Trigger.dev provider integration.

allowDegradedExecution.description: Whether the ERP may continue processing when the spine is degraded.

appReleaseSha.description: Git commit SHA of the deployed ERP application release.

deadLetterCount.description: Count of outbox messages in the dead-letter queue.

lastScheduleRegistrationAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last successful outbox schedule registration.

lastScheduleRegistrationError.description: Last error message from outbox schedule registration, if any.

lastSuccessfulPublishAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last successful outbox message publish.

lastWorkerVersionCheckAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last Trigger worker version alignment check.

lastWorkerVersionCheckError.description: Last error message from worker version alignment check, if any.

oldestPendingOutboxAgeSeconds.description: Age in seconds of the oldest unpublished outbox message.

operationalStatus.description: Derived operational status for the execution spine.

outboxScheduleId.description: Trigger.dev schedule identifier for the outbox processor.

outboxScheduleRegistered.description: Whether the outbox processor schedule is registered.

pendingOutboxCount.description: Number of outbox messages awaiting publish.

schedulerRequired.description: Whether a scheduler must be running for correct ERP operation.

triggerGitCommitSha.description: Git commit SHA reported by the Trigger.dev deployment.

triggerProviderState.description: Live connectivity state of the Trigger.dev provider.

triggerWorkerVersion.description: Semantic version of the Trigger worker runtime.

workerReleaseAligned.description: Whether the Trigger worker release matches the ERP deployment.

workerReleaseCheckRequired.description: Whether worker release alignment checks are enforced for this deployment.

ExecutionSpineDiagnostics.description: Execution spine diagnostics covering outbox, scheduler, and Trigger worker alignment.

correlationId.description: End-to-end correlation identifier propagated across services for this request.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for this HTTP request within the ERP.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the response was generated.

ApiResponseMeta.description: Standard metadata envelope included on every API response.

activeMembershipCount.description: Total number of active memberships for the signed-in user.

entryPath.description: Relative post-auth path the client should navigate to after membership resolution.

requiresOrganizationSelect.description: Whether the client must prompt the user to select an organization before continuing.

requiresWorkspaceSelect.description: Whether the client must prompt the user to select a workspace before continuing.

targets.description: Membership switch targets available to the signed-in user.

workspaceTargetCount.description: Number of workspace-level targets requiring selection when applicable.

AuthMembershipsGetResponse.description: Post-login membership resolution payload guiding client navigation and context selection.

companySlug.description: URL-safe slug identifying the target company.

isSelected.description: Whether this target matches the caller's currently active membership context.

label.description: Human-readable label for the membership switch target.

organizationSlug.description: Optional organization slug when the target is scoped below company level.

AuthMembershipSwitchTarget.description: A selectable company or organization membership the caller may switch into.

accepted.description: Acknowledgement that the error report was accepted for processing.

ClientErrorPostResponse.description: Acknowledgement response for client error ingestion.

layout.description: Resolved dashboard layout preset for the workspace.

source.description: Whether the layout was loaded from tenant defaults or persisted storage.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the stored layout was last updated, or null for defaults.

DashboardLayoutResponse.description: Workspace dashboard layout with provenance metadata.

reset.description: Confirms the workspace layout was reset to the tenant default.

DashboardLayoutDeleteResponse.description: Acknowledgement that the stored dashboard layout was reset.

products.description: Product master records for the active tenant.

InventoryProductsListResponse.description: List of product master records within tenant scope.

productId.description: UUID of the product master record.
UUID of the affected product master record.

InventoryProductMutationResponse.description: Identifier returned after a product create or update.

stockLevels.description: Stock level snapshots for the active company.

InventoryStockLevelsListResponse.description: List of quantity-on-hand snapshots within company scope.

productId.description: UUID of the product master record.

quantityOnHand.description: Decimal quantity on hand as a string.

warehouseId.description: UUID of the warehouse master record.

InventoryStockLevelRecord.description: Quantity-on-hand snapshot for a product at a warehouse.

movementId.description: UUID of the recorded stock movement.

quantityOnHand.description: Resulting quantity on hand after the movement.

InventoryStockMovementMutationResponse.description: Result returned after recording a stock movement.

warehouses.description: Warehouse master records for the active company.

InventoryWarehousesListResponse.description: List of warehouse master records within company scope.

warehouseId.description: UUID of the warehouse master record.
UUID of the affected warehouse master record.

InventoryWarehouseMutationResponse.description: Identifier returned after a warehouse create or update.

membershipId.description: UUID of the created pending membership record.

userId.description: UUID of the invited or matched user record.

SystemAdminUserInviteResponse.description: Identifiers for the invited user and pending membership.

roleId.description: UUID of the role now assigned to the membership.

SystemAdminMembershipRoleResponse.description: Confirmation of the updated membership role assignment.

events.description: Page of audit events matching the query filters.

SystemAdminAuditEventsResponse.description: Paginated list of system-admin audit events.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the audit event was recorded.

id.description: UUID of the audit event row.

module.description: Logical module that emitted the audit event.

targetId.description: UUID of the primary target entity, if applicable.

targetType.description: Entity type of the audit target (e.g. user, membership).

SystemAdminAuditEventRow.description: Single system-admin audit event row for list responses.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the presigned upload URL expires.

headers.description: Required HTTP headers the client must send with the presigned PUT request.

method.description: HTTP method to use against the presigned upload URL.

objectId.description: UUID identifying the storage object once upload completes.

path.description: Storage object key path within the tenant bucket.

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for direct binary upload via HTTP PUT.

TenantBrandLogoUploadResponse.description: Presigned upload instructions for a tenant brand logo binary object.

error.description: Structured error details for failed requests.

meta.description: Response metadata for the failed request.

ApiErrorEnvelope.description: Standard error envelope for governed internal API routes.

category.description: High-level error category for client handling.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier matching the request meta.

details.description: Optional structured validation or context details (shape varies by error code).

message.description: Human-readable error message safe to display to operators.

retryable.description: Whether the client may safely retry the same request.

ApiErrorBody.description: Governed error payload nested inside the error envelope.
